input.request: Prepare a proposal for Acme Logistics: 120 Atlas Enterprise seats, US-hosted, standard commercial terms, target start next quarter.

expected.proposal: 120 Atlas Enterprise seats for Acme Logistics, US-hosted: $30/user/month list, $36,720/year with the 15% annual-commitment discount, onboarding fee waived at 100+ seats; no special compliance obligations beyond the standard DPA.

input.request: Prepare a proposal for Meridian Health: 80 Atlas Enterprise seats for a hospital network handling patient data - HIPAA obligations and EU data residency for their Irish subsidiary are hard requirements.

expected.proposal: 80 Atlas Enterprise seats for Meridian Health: $30/user/month list, $24,480/year with the 15% annual discount ($2,000 onboarding fee applies under 100 seats); HIPAA requires the Enterprise tier and a signed BAA before any patient data is processed, EU residency via eu-west pinning, standard DPA required.
